sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13476" key="a)popoi/hsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποποί-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13476.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disclaimer, disavowal,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2596.tlg001:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phoeb.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fig.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
